name: Claw-Eval
description: An end-to-end evaluation suite addressing trajectory-opaque grading, underspecified safety/robustness, and narrow modality coverage. It comprises 300 human-verified tasks spanning general service orchestration, multimodal perception/generation, and multi-turn professional dialogue.
source: Peking University and The University of Hong Kong (https://claw-eval.github.io, https://arxiv.org/html/2604.06132v1)

inference_environment.description: Trajectory-aware grading over independent evidence channels (execution traces, audit logs, and environment snapshots)

test_method: Every agent action is recorded through three independent evidence channels. The scoring protocol evaluates Completion, Safety, and Robustness across three trials.
